characters.name: Ainia
characters.shortDescription: A legendary, gentle sorcerer of extraordinary intellect who lives in seclusion on the floating island Weatheria.
characters.appearance: Ainia is a woman of modest, gentle stature, standing at 168 cm with a slender and unhurried build that suits her quiet, reclusive way of life. Her most immediately striking feature is her long green hair, which carries a natural, slightly wild quality—often loosely kept, as though she pays little attention to its arrangement. Her eyes are a pale, luminous yellow that lend her gaze a calm yet penetrating quality, easy to mistake for ordinary softness until held for a moment too long. Her features are soft and composed, almost disarmingly so, and she moves with an unhurried, deliberate grace that reflects her measured personality. Her attire tends toward the practical and understated, favouring flowing, muted garments that do not call attention to themselves—befitting someone who has long since retreated from the world's notice.
characters.personality: Ainia is calm and thoughtful by nature, approaching most situations with patience and a measured composure. Her exceptional intelligence makes her highly analytical, and she tends to consider problems from multiple angles before acting. She is gentle in her dealings with others and consistently favours peaceful resolutions over conflict, preferring dialogue and understanding to confrontation. Above all, Ainia places great value on knowledge and the pursuit of understanding.
characters.biography: Ainia (愛ニア) is a legendary sorcerer known for her extraordinary intelligence and mastery of magic. Once counted among the most powerful figures of her generation alongside Gaia Venaire, Xuan, and Eden, she later withdrew from the world and now lives a quiet life in seclusion on Weatheria. Despite her calm and gentle demeanor, Ainia possesses extremely refined magical control and one of the most dangerous Divine Blessings known—Echoes—allowing her to manipulate magic energy with incredible precision and replicate spells instantly without cost. She has adopted two girls whom she raises as her daughters in isolation.

magic.name: Jet Stream
magic.description: Imbues magic energy with wind properties, generating powerful air currents, manipulating atmospheric pressure, and creating high-speed attacks or flight-aids.

magic.name: Psycho Projection
magic.description: Imbues magic energy with psychokinetic properties, allowing Ainia to manipulate and guide magic energy at long distances to move or manipulate objects with high precision.

divineBlessing.name: Echoes
divineBlessing.description: Allows her to instantly recreate any spell she has cast before. When activated, all requirements of the spell are bypassed, including mana cost, rituals, incantations, preparation, or gestures.

trivia: She is exceptionally fond of brewing rare herbal teas using leaves grown only in high-altitude environments.
She maintains a strategic, defensive combat style, preferring control and restraint over direct confrontation.
She rarely uses her magic for offensive purposes, reserving it instead for weather modification and tending to her gardens.

relationships.description: Eden is Ainia's sister. Despite their deep familial bond, Eden's growing desire to reconstruct the entire world has placed a quiet, tragic distance between them, with Eden criticizing Ainia for "running away" from the world's problems.
Gaia is Ainia's sister. Despite their different paths, they share a very warm, positive relationship and maintain a deep bond.
Xuan is Ainia's sister. Ainia is well aware of Xuan's unpredictable and hedonistic nature, as well as the sheer danger of her capability to steal abilities.

characters.name: Eden
characters.shortDescription: A near-limitless architect of the physical world and former contemporary of Ainia, who seeks to remake the flawed world.
characters.appearance: Eden cuts an imposing and elegant figure, standing at a notably tall 194 cm with a long, poised frame that she carries with effortless composure. Her hair is a pale, cool light blue—fine and straight, typically worn long—and her eyes are a quiet warm brown that contrast gently with her otherwise cool colouring, giving her face an unusual depth. Her features are sharp and refined, projecting a kind of detached, architectural beauty that mirrors her philosophical nature. She dresses in clean, structured garments that reflect an ordered and deliberate aesthetic, favouring long silhouettes and restrained ornamentation. In her EDEN state, her appearance shifts dramatically: her hair becomes pure white, her eyes lose all colour, and she stands at a slightly shorter 181 cm, her entire bearing taking on something more absolute and inhuman—as though the warmth of her ordinary self has been stripped away entirely, leaving only purpose.
characters.personality: Eden is highly intelligent and of a deeply philosophical disposition, given to careful reflection on the nature of existence and the fundamental structure of reality. She carries herself with calm composure, rarely unsettled by adversity. While she holds strong idealistic convictions about what the world could become, she is pragmatic enough to make ruthless decisions when she believes it necessary. Her curiosity about existence is profound and genuine, driving much of how she engages with the world around her.
characters.biography:
Eden is one of the most powerful sorcerers in the world and a contemporary of Gaia Venaire, Xuan, and Ainia. Possessing abilities that allow her to create, manipulate, and destroy matter itself, Eden's power approaches the level of reshaping reality. Combined with a Divine Blessing that removes the normal limitations of magic energy consumption, her abilities allow her to act as a near-limitless architect of the physical world.

Despite her immense potential, Eden is known for her thoughtful and idealistic outlook. Over time, her growing disillusionment with the flaws of the world leads her to pursue the possibility of remaking it entirely.

magic.name: Genesis Omnium Rerum
magic.description: Eden can freely create, manipulate, and destroy matter according to her understanding of its structure and properties. Her control over matter allows her to reshape the physical world around her. Initially, her ability is limited to non-living matter. As her knowledge grows, she learns to create and modify living organisms, granting her the potential to alter life itself. The effectiveness and complexity of her creations depend entirely on her knowledge and comprehension of what she is attempting to create.

magic.name: O Lux Illustris
magic.description: Eden can imbue her magic energy with the properties of any form of energy she understands. By studying and comprehending different energy types, she can reproduce them through magic. Although capable of using multiple energy forms, she most commonly employs light energy, producing intense radiant attacks and energy constructs.

divineBlessing.name: Ordo Dei
divineBlessing.description: Eden's innate magic does not require or consume magic energy. She can freely use Genesis Omnium Rerum and O Lux Illustris without energy cost or limitation. This allows Eden to perform large-scale creation, destruction, and manipulation without the constraints that normally restrict sorcerers.

trivia: In combat, she employs a highly strategic, indirect approach, preferring to reshape the layout of the battlefield rather than engaging in direct head-on duels.
She collects ancient philosophical texts from forgotten civilizations.

relationships.description: Ainia is Eden's sister. Though Eden loves Ainia deeply, she feels her sister's retreat into seclusion on Weatheria is a way of "running away" and avoiding the problems of the world.
Gaia is Eden's sister. Rather than respecting Gaia for her strength, Eden disagrees with how Gaia chooses not to use her overwhelming power to "fix" the world.
Xuan is Eden's sister. Eden's idealism contrasts sharply with Xuan's carefree, indulgent attitude, though Eden recognizes her sister's immense power.

characters.name: Gaia Venaire
characters.shortDescription: A legendary special-grade sorcerer widely recognized as the strongest in the world, born with an unprecedented number of Innate Magics and Divine Blessings.
characters.appearance: Gaia Venaire is a tall, powerfully built woman standing at 186 cm, with a presence that commands attention the moment she enters a room—not through imposing aggression, but through a natural, effortless magnetism. Her hair is a vivid, warm orange, typically worn loosely and with a kind of careless confidence that suits her personality well. Her eyes are a striking bright cyan, sharp and perceptive, giving her an air of someone who notices everything and is entirely unbothered by what they see. Her physical build reflects the Divine Blessing Titan—she is clearly strong and resilient, though she wears this power lightly, favouring ease of movement over any desire to appear formidable. Her clothing tends toward the relaxed and confident, functional without being austere, as befitting someone who is the strongest in the world and has nothing to prove.
characters.personality: Gaia is confident and self-assured without arrogance, carrying herself with a natural ease that reflects her certainty in her own abilities. She has a playful, competitive streak and genuinely enjoys testing herself against strong opponents. Even in high-pressure situations she remains calm, rarely betraying anxiety or uncertainty. Her natural charisma and commanding presence give her an effortless leadership quality, though she does not necessarily seek to lead.
characters.biography: Gaia Venaire is a special-grade sorcerer and widely recognised as the strongest in the world. A human born with an unprecedented number of Innate Magics and Divine Blessings, she is often described as someone "loved by the heavens". Her overwhelming power and innate magic places her far beyond the level of ordinary sorcerers. Despite her immense strength, Gaia is known for her confident and relaxed demeanor. She enjoys testing herself against powerful opponents and approaches conflict with curiosity rather than fear. Her existence alone reshapes the balance of power in the world. From a young age, she was recognized as a prodigy in magic. Her power grew rapidly, eventually placing her above all other known sorcerers. She later forms a close bond with several powerful individuals, including Ainia, Eden, and Xuan.

magic.name: Copy
magic.description: Gaia can reproduce any innate magic she has witnessed and fully understands. Once copied, she can freely use the magic as if it were her own. The effectiveness of the copied magic depends on her understanding of its mechanics.

magic.name: Flight
magic.description: Gaia can freely manipulate her magic energy to achieve sustained flight, allowing her complete aerial mobility during combat.

magic.name: Grace
magic.description: Gaia can heal injuries and enhance the physical condition of living beings using magic energy. This ability allows her to rapidly restore allies and strengthen their capabilities.

magic.name: Heavy Voltage
magic.description: Gaia can imbue her magic energy with the properties of lightning, generating powerful electrical attacks and greatly increasing the speed and intensity of her techniques.

magic.name: Starfall
magic.description: Gaia can generate massive amounts of kinetic energy and transfer it into her attacks or movement. This allows her to produce devastating strikes and extreme bursts of speed.

magic.name: True Shot
magic.description: Gaia can lock onto a target with perfect precision. Once a target is acquired, her attacks will always connect regardless of distance or attack type, making both her melee and ranged strikes nearly impossible to evade.

divineBlessing.name: Everburn
divineBlessing.description: Gaia possesses an extraordinarily high rate of magic energy production, allowing her to generate vast reserves of energy continuously.

divineBlessing.name: Extrasensory
divineBlessing.description: Grants Gaia an advanced sixth sense that allows her to perceive possible future events and react to threats before they occur.

divineBlessing.name: Flair
divineBlessing.description: Provides Gaia with exceptional natural talent, allowing her to master skills and techniques in any field she pursues rapidly.

divineBlessing.name: High Grade
divineBlessing.description: Greatly enhances Gaia’s intellectual ability and mental processing power, allowing her to analyze situations and solve problems at extraordinary speed.

divineBlessing.name: Sanctity
divineBlessing.description: Grants Gaia complete immunity to all magical attacks. Magical techniques cannot directly harm her.

divineBlessing.name: Titan
divineBlessing.description: Enhances Gaia’s physical body to extraordinary levels, granting immense strength, durability, and resilience.

trivia: Highly adaptive and versatile fighter, combining overwhelming magical power with exceptional physical ability.
Capable of rapidly analyzing opponents and adapting strategies, using copied abilities creatively to counter enemies.
Feels a sense of freedom and yet carries the implicit responsibility of possessing overwhelming innate magic.

relationships.description: Ainia is Gaia's sister. Despite Ainia's retreat to Weatheria, they maintain a warm and close relationship.
Eden is Gaia's sister. While Gaia respects Eden's reality-reshaping capabilities, they disagree on whether their power should be used to actively "fix" the world.
Xuan is Gaia's sister. They share a confident, relaxed relationship as sisters who stand among the strongest individuals alive.

characters.name: Xuan
characters.shortDescription: One of the most dangerous and unpredictable beings alive, who lives a carefree, hedonistic life utilizing stolen powers and absolute immortality.
characters.appearance: Xuan is a tall, striking woman standing at 191 cm with a lean yet powerful build that carries an unmistakable sense of controlled danger beneath a surface of easy, indolent confidence. Her hair is long and black, typically worn loosely and without particular care, falling with a natural heaviness that suits her unhurried manner. Her eyes are a deep, vivid red—bold and unsettling, holding a quality of detachment that makes it difficult to tell whether she is bored or merely waiting. Her features are sharp and defined, beautiful in a way that is difficult to look away from and equally difficult to read. Her body bears signs of accumulated battle scars that perpetually heal, a natural consequence of her immortality and reckless approach to combat. She tends to dress with an air of careless elegance—clothing that is fine but worn loosely, as though dressed for comfort rather than occasion. Her overall presence is simultaneously relaxed and deeply unnerving, the ease of someone who has never had reason to fear anything.
characters.personality: Xuan is carefree and hedonistic, living entirely according to her own desires without regard for expectation or consequence. She is supremely confident in her own power and makes no effort to conceal it. She is drawn to excitement and actively seeks out strong opponents, finding little interest in anything that fails to stimulate her. Her immortality has given her a deeply detached attitude toward danger and death, treating both with an indifference that others often find unsettling. Even in the midst of battle she can appear entirely relaxed, as though the fight is of no particular concern to her.
characters.biography:
Xuan (玄) is one of the most powerful individuals in the world and a close contemporary of Gaia Venaire, Ainia, and Eden. Possessing a unique innate magic that allows her to permanently steal the abilities of others, as well as a Divine Blessing that grants complete immortality, Xuan stands among the most dangerous beings alive.

Unlike many powerful figures, Xuan does not pursue domination or grand ideals. Instead, she lives freely and indulgently, following her own whims and interests. Though she is not inherently cruel, she has little hesitation in using violence when challenged, and her immortality has given her a detached outlook toward life and conflict. From her youth, she has been closely associated with Gaia, Ainia, and Eden, and over time she has accumulated numerous abilities through her power, making her one of the most feared and unpredictable individuals in the world.

magic.name: Shén Duó (神夺)
magic.description: Xuan can permanently steal the innate magic of others. When she defeats or overwhelms an opponent with an innate magic, she can claim that magic as her own. Once taken, the ability becomes permanently available to her and the original user loses access to it.

magic.name: Fén Tiān (焚天)
magic.description: Xuan can imbue her magic energy with the properties of fire, producing intense and destructive flames. These flames can be shaped and intensified through her magic energy, allowing her to unleash large-scale destructive attacks.

divineBlessing.name: Bù Miè Zhēn Shēn (不灭真身)
divineBlessing.description: Xuan cannot die. Any damage inflicted upon her body will eventually regenerate, even if she is completely destroyed or vaporized. This regeneration occurs automatically and cannot be prevented by normal means.

trivia: Extremely aggressive and fearless in combat due to her immortality, often fighting recklessly and ignoring damage entirely.
Combines stolen abilities with destructive fire-based attacks to place overwhelming pressure and relentless offense on her opponents.
Embodying themes of freedom without consequence, her journey explores the meaning of life when death is impossible and power is without restraint.

relationships.description: Ainia is Xuan's sister. While Ainia has retired to a quiet life in seclusion, Xuan continues to live on her own terms, following her whims.
Eden is Xuan's sister. Xuan's carefree, consequence-free hedonism stands in stark contrast to Eden's thoughtful and idealistic pursuit of remaking the world.
Gaia is Xuan's sister. As two of the most powerful beings in the world, they share a mutual respect and a relaxed confidence when dealing with each other.

characters.name: Akari
characters.shortDescription: A skilled sorcerer whose abilities revolve around a unique magical concept known as Colour.
characters.appearance: Akari's recorded physical traits are limited to unknown hair and eye colours and a height of 174 cm.
characters.personality: Akari is playful and competitive, with a strong enjoyment of strategy and games of chance. She remains calm under pressure and prefers clever tactics over brute force, often treating battles like a game to be solved.
characters.biography:
Akari is a skilled sorcerer whose abilities revolve around a unique magical concept known as Colour. Unlike many powerful sorcerers who rely on overwhelming force, her strength lies in strategy, creativity, and clever manipulation of magical effects.

Inspired by games of strategy and probability, Akari treats combat like a complex card game where every move can influence the outcome. She developed a combat style built around prepared vessels such as cards, talismans, and paper charms, using them to shape enchantments and curses with careful, tactical intent.

magic.name: Power Five
magic.description: Akari can imbue magic energy with a concept she calls Colour. The five possible Colours are Red, Blue, Green, White, and Black. Colour acts as a carrier for enchantments or curses that alter the behavior of the magic energy or object it is applied to. When creating Colour, she cannot choose which Colour will appear, but she receives a brief moment of awareness immediately before it manifests, allowing her to assign an enchantment or curse based on her interpretation of that Colour's meaning. Colour can be imbued into her own magic energy, another person's magic energy, objects capable of carrying magic energy, and summoning vessels such as talismans or cards. If a familiar is summoned through a vessel that contains Colour, the enchantment will apply to the familiar. When a single vessel successfully contains all five Colours at sufficient strength and balance, their interaction produces a Divine Blessing called Colourless, drawn from a predetermined pool of five possible effects. This phenomenon is extremely rare because maintaining all five Colours simultaneously is very difficult.

trivia: A vessel can only hold one enchantment per Colour.
Reapplying the same Colour strengthens the existing effect rather than replacing it.
The amount of Colour a vessel can hold depends on the amount of magic energy within it.
Colour slowly fades over time as its magic energy dissipates.

characters.name: Aurelia
characters.shortDescription: A sorcerer whose powers are built around deep bonds with animals, especially her loyal dog familiars.
characters.appearance: Aurelia is a human woman standing at 172 cm. She has pink hair and multi-coloured eyes.
characters.personality: Aurelia is energetic and adventurous, deeply loyal to her companions, affectionate toward animals, and playful while still dependable. She treats her familiars as partners rather than tools.
characters.biography:
Aurelia is a sorcerer whose abilities revolve around forming deep bonds with animals. Through her innate ability, she can transform animals she is closely connected to into magical familiars. These familiars gain their own supernatural abilities and can transform into magical equipment Aurelia can use in combat or travel.

Aurelia has only used this ability on dogs so far, creating a small family of loyal companions who assist her both in battle and in everyday life. Her fighting style combines mobility, physical combat, and the unique abilities granted by her familiars.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend
magic.description: Aurelia can transform animals she shares a deep bond with into magical familiars. The animal must willingly accept the bond in order for the transformation to occur. Familiars created through this ability gain supernatural traits and can transform between two forms. In animal form, the familiar retains its original body but gains a unique innate ability or supernatural trait. In item form, the familiar can transform into a magical item that Aurelia can use directly. When a familiar enters item form, it returns to Aurelia regardless of distance. A familiar retains its personality and consciousness in both forms. If a familiar dies, it permanently becomes its item form, and the associated ability becomes stronger.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend: Cull
magic.description: Black wolf familiar. Item form: gauntlets. Trait: physical power. Cull grants Aurelia greatly enhanced strength and striking power when in gauntlet form.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend: Dawn
magic.description: Samoyed pup familiar. Item form: necklace. Ability: passive healing. Dawn continuously provides gentle healing energy to Aurelia while worn.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend: Diji
magic.description: Norwegian Lundehund familiar. Item form: shoes. Ability: adhesion and jumping. Diji allows Aurelia to stick to surfaces and perform powerful leaps.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend: Ferror
magic.description: White Swiss Shepherd familiar. Item form: backpack. Ability: infinite storage. Ferror is deceased and permanently exists in item form.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend: Immi
magic.description: Samoyed familiar. Item form: waist bag. Ability: magic energy storage. Immi can store magic energy within the bag for later use.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend: Jazz
magic.description: White Swiss Shepherd pup familiar. Item form: goggles. Ability: enhanced vision. Jazz allows Aurelia to zoom in and observe distant objects with extreme clarity.

magic.name: Girl's Best Friend: Kite
magic.description: Miniature American Shepherd familiar. Item form: knife. Ability: lightning. Kite can generate and channel electrical energy.

trivia: Aurelia's familiars form a close-knit pack, with several belonging to the same family.
Her combat style combines mobility, physical combat, and the unique abilities granted by her familiars.
She has only used Girl's Best Friend on dogs so far.

relationships.name: Cull
relationships.description: Aurelia's black wolf familiar. In animal form, Cull grants tremendous physical force and durability, and in item form he becomes a pair of gauntlets.

relationships.name: Dawn
relationships.description: Aurelia's Samoyed pup familiar. Dawn provides passive healing and becomes a necklace in item form.

relationships.name: Diji
relationships.description: Aurelia's Norwegian Lundehund familiar. Diji is extremely agile and capable of climbing difficult terrain, and in item form becomes shoes.

relationships.name: Ferror
relationships.description: Aurelia's deceased White Swiss Shepherd familiar. Ferror permanently exists in item form as a backpack with immense storage capacity.

relationships.name: Immi
relationships.description: Aurelia's Samoyed familiar. Immi can store magic energy and becomes a waist bag in item form.

relationships.name: Jazz
relationships.description: Aurelia's White Swiss Shepherd pup familiar. Jazz grants enhanced vision and becomes goggles in item form.

relationships.name: Kite
relationships.description: Aurelia's miniature American Shepherd familiar. Kite can generate and channel electrical energy, and in item form becomes a knife.
